## What does this change

Describe what was changed and which section(s) are affected.

## Why

Explain the reason. If this fixes a reported issue, reference it: `Closes #123`

## Type of change

- [ ] Fix (broken link, typo, factual error, incorrect code)
- [ ] Improvement (clarifying an existing explanation or code example)
- [ ] New content (new section or subsection)
- [ ] Reference (adding a missing citation or resource)

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is accurate and verifiable
- [ ] Code examples are syntactically correct
- [ ] Any new references include: title, author, year, and URL where applicable
- [ ] The writing is consistent in tone with the rest of the guide
